snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi(
    api_key="YOUR_API_KEY",
    token="YOUR_TOKEN",
)
client.v1.list_users()
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    api_key="YOUR_API_KEY",
    token="YOUR_TOKEN",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.v1.list_users()


asyncio.run(main())
